items.name: Dating Platform
items.description: Real-time communication platform designed around WebSocket messaging, JWT authentication, and modern backend architecture.
items.teamInfo: Team of 3 · System Design & Performance Optimization
highlights: Designed and implemented a real-time messaging architecture using WebSocket/STOMP, enabling low-latency bidirectional communication for chat, notifications, and live interaction events.
Researched and optimized composite indexing strategies for discovery queries reducing query latency on a 50k-row dataset, validated using EXPLAIN ANALYZE.
Implemented Redis-based cache-aside strategy for user profiles and frequently accessed matching data, reducing database query volume by ~40% and improving response consistency under load.
Secured both REST and WebSocket communication using JWT authentication, including authenticated handshake interception that rejects unauthorized connections before broker access.
Built a custom rate-limiting and abuse-protection filter for sensitive endpoints (authentication, OTP, password recovery), mitigating brute-force and spam request patterns.
Developed JUnit 5 and Mockito unit/integration tests covering authentication workflows, matching rules, and business validation logic to ensure reliability across service layers.

items.name: HRM System
items.description: Enterprise HR management platform covering employee lifecycle management from recruitment to payroll.
highlights: Designed and implemented 5 core ERP-HR modules (Recruitment, Employee Management, Attendance, Payroll, and Training) with 30+ RESTful APIs following layered architecture and clean service abstraction.
Built composable dynamic querying using JPA Specification API, enabling flexible filtering, search, pagination, and sorting across multiple business modules with reusable specifications.
Optimized data access with Cache-Aside Redis strategy, B-Tree and composite indexing, and horizontal partitioning for payroll history tables to improve query performance on large datasets.
Integrated role-based access control (RBAC) with Spring Security, securing sensitive HR operations such as salary updates, employee records access, and attendance approval workflows.
Containerized infrastructure with Docker for consistent local development and deployment environments, including database, cache, and application service orchestration.
